text: Bhai ko property mein bada hissa mila taaki wo apni nayi factory shuru kar sake, aur mujhe bola gaya ki bade hone ke naate mujhe bas khush hona chahiye. Main ghar ke kalesh aur saas ke taano ke beech itni thak chuki hoon, par main ruk nahi sakti kyunki mujhe apne bacchon ka bhavishya aur bhai ki izzat sambhalni hai. Thakna mere liye ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakti.

Mummy-Papa ne saara batwara bhai ke haq mein kar diya taaki wo settle ho jaye, aur mujhse umeed ki jati hai ki main bina shikayat sab sambhalun. Career gap ki wajah se pehle hi udaas hoon, par ab ghar aur rishtedari ki zimmedari itni hai ki rone ka waqt bhi nahi milta. Mujhe bas chalte rehna hai kyunki poore parivaar ka bojh mere hi endurance par tika hai.

Bhai ko jaydad milne par log kya kahenge ki behan ko kuch nahi mila, is darr se main muskurakar sab seh rahi hoon. Main mentally aur physically itni exhaust ho chuki hoon ki lagta hai abhi gir jaungi, par bacchon ki padhai aur ghar ke kamo ki wajah se 'cannot afford to stop' wali halat hai. Meri kurbani hi is parivaar ki structural stability banaye rakhegi.

Saas kehti hain ki bhai ko property dena hi sahi hai kyunki wahi khandaan ka naam aage badhayega, aur main unki baat chup-chap maan kar ghar ke kamo mein pis rahi hoon. Main itni thaki hui hoon ki dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, par mujhe bhai ki shadi aur bacchon ki zimmedari ke liye himmat jutani hi hogi. Rukne ka matlab hai sab bikhar jana, isliye mujhe bas duty nibhate rehna hai.

Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki bhai ko azadi aur property mili, aur mujhe sirf saas-bahu ka kalesh aur 'lost identity' ka dard. Main poori tarah toot chuki hoon par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye mujhe din-raat ek karna hi padega taaki bhai ka rasta saaf rahe. Mera kaam sirf endurance dikhana hai, chahe andar se main kitni bhi khaali mehsus karun.
